scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep after identity187-189. Scope is project aliases only. Current live validation leaves only project duplicate identity pairs that fail project-vs-program, phase/date/location, support-bundle, amendment/contract, or same-name-different-agency guards.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch191-prep.json. No merges.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical JSONL, canonical DB, materialized outputs, wiki files, or provider-backed commands were edited or used.

deterministic_inspection.method: Read-only validateRepo() via bun --eval plus canonical JSONL and current identity override inspection.

candidate_limit.requested: up to 8 high-confidence project aliases if possible
candidate_limit.note: No current project duplicate pair cleared semantic review. The safe batch is intentionally empty rather than padding with low-confidence aliases.

blockers.detail: All 13 current project duplicate identity pairs are already known semantic traps or newly re-confirmed traps. Shared identity keys are caused by broad labels or aliases embedded in records, not enough evidence for same-project identity.
Several deferred pairs include one or both ids that are existing merge targets. Because the underlying project identity is not proven, no acyclic chain collapse is proposed.

inspections.purpose: Read-only live validation scan for duplicate_global_identity issues restricted to Global project records.

inspections.command: bun --eval '<canonical projects JSONL summaries for the 13 current project duplicate pairs>'
inspections.purpose: Collected source-backed canonical summaries, aliases, payload fields, and evidence refs for semantic review.

inspections.command: bun --eval '<project override guard scan over merges.json and do-not-merge.json>'
inspections.purpose: Checked record presence, current alias targets, existing merge-target status, and raw do-not-merge status without editing overrides.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_2017-street-improvement-79th share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project.
Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_2017-street-improvement-79th share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project-woodhaven-blvd.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Woodhaven Boulevard Queens street improvement project; 6.85 miles of bus lanes installed with Q52/Q53 SBS launch.

source_evidence.quote: Launched the M79 Select Bus Service to replace the M79 Local

deferred.reason: Location and route scope mismatch: Woodhaven Boulevard/Q52-Q53 in Queens versus 79th Street/M79 in Manhattan. The shared 2017 Street Improvement Project wording is too broad.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_2017-sip-woodhaven-blvd-cb5-sept2024 and project_79th-st-2017-improvement-cb7-apr2025 share identity key project_2017-st-improvement-project.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Completed Woodhaven Boulevard bus-lane work in Queens.
Completed 79th Street/M79 SBS street improvement project in Manhattan.

deferred.reason: Location mismatch: Woodhaven Boulevard in Queens versus 79th Street in Manhattan. Same-year generic project wording is not same-project evidence.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_able-camera-expansion-2022 and project_able-program share identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able.
Global project records project_able-camera-expansion-2022 and project_able-program share identity key project_automated-bus-lane-enforcement-able-expansion.

source_evidence.quote: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement (ABLE) had been activated on an additional twelve routes

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Operational on-bus mobile camera system under the ABLE program.

deferred.reason: Program-vs-expansion trap: a 2022/2023 camera expansion is related to but not identical to the broader operational ABLE program.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_annual-2021-cbdtp and project_cbd-tolling-transcore-mod share identity key project_central-business-district-tolling-program-transcore-contract-modification.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Central Business District Tolling Program, a Manhattan congestion pricing program.
TransCore contract modification adding funds and extending a CBDTP contract.

deferred.reason: Program-vs-contract-modification trap: a TransCore contract modification is an implementing action under CBDTP, not safely the same canonical project identity.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_annual-2021-east-side-access and project_east-side-access-support share identity key project_east-side-access-support.
Global project records project_annual-2021-east-side-access and project_east-side-access-support share identity key project_east-side-access-support-projects.
Global project records project_annual-2021-east-side-access and project_east-side-access-support share identity key project_meeting-doc-east-side-access-support.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: East Side Access rail expansion bringing LIRR into Grand Central Terminal.

source_evidence.quote: The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

deferred.reason: Project-vs-support-bundle trap: East Side Access Support Projects are related support work, not safely identical to the East Side Access project.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_fordham-rd-bus-priority and project_fordham-rd-bus-priority-cb5-may2026 share identity key project_fordham-rd-bus-priority.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Fordham Road-Inwood Bx12 corridor study with multiple alternatives.

source_evidence.quote: Sedgwick Av to Bronx River Parkway

deferred.reason: Scope/location narrowing trap: the older Fordham Road-Inwood corridor study spans a broader Bx12 corridor context, while the 2026 record is specifically Sedgwick Avenue to Bronx River Parkway.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_jamaica-capacity-improvement and project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-phase2 share identity key project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-project.
Global project records project_jamaica-capacity-improvement and project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-phase2 share identity key project_jamaica-capacity-improvement-project-phase-2.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Switch installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project.

source_evidence.quote: Acquisition of property interests for Phase 2 of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project

deferred.reason: Phase trap: Phase 2/property-interest actions may be a subphase under the broader Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project, not the same project record.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_hall-interlocking-expansion and project_jamaica-capacity-improvements share identity key project_hall-interlocking-expansion.

source_evidence.quote: the work they are doing to finish up the first phase of the Jamaica Capacity Improvements

deferred.reason: Component/subproject trap: Hall Interlocking Expansion is described as part of JCI Phase 2, but that relationship is not same-project identity with Jamaica Capacity Improvements.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_01-lexington-ave and project_lexington-ave-60th-52nd-offset-bus-lane share identity key project_lexington-ave-bus-lane-upgrades-60th-st-to-52nd-st.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Lexington Avenue bus lane enhancement from 96th Street to 60th Street.

source_evidence.quote: Improve bus service by upgrading existing curbside bus lane to 24/7 offset bus lane

deferred.reason: Adjacent/narrower-location trap: 96th-60th Street and 60th-52nd Street are compatible bus-lane work on Lexington Avenue but not safely the same project scope.

source_evidence.quote: East Side Access Support Projects Update

validator_evidence: Global project records project_park-ave-viaduct-phase1 and project_park-avenue-viaduct-repair share identity key project_park-ave-viaduct-replacement-phase-1.

source_evidence.canonical_summary: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Phase 1 design-build work, awarded.
Broader Park Avenue Viaduct state-of-good-repair effort including phases and interim repairs.

deferred.reason: Phase/broader-program trap: Phase 1 replacement may be part of the broader Park Avenue Viaduct SOGR effort, but not safely identical to the broader repair/replacement program.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_penn-reconstruction-2020-2024 and project_penn-station-reconstruction-design share identity key project_penn-reconstruction-amendment2.

source_evidence.quote: Penn Reconstruction. The State of New York is advancing a new project to address the reconstruction of Penn Station.
A new $100 million project is included in this proposed amendment to advance initial preparations for the Penn Station Reconstruction effort

deferred.reason: Capital-program amendment/design-services trap: design services and amendment records are related to Penn Reconstruction but not safely the same project identity as the broader capital-program project.

validator_evidence: Global project records project_lirr-security-initiatives and project_security-initiatives-nyct share identity key project_security-initiatives.

source_evidence.quote: Security- Funding was added to monitor security cameras at several additional locations to retrieve electronic data for video distribution to law enforcement agencies

Security Initiatives: Additional staffing in the Security Command Center to respond to requests for video stemming from Laser Intrusion Detection Sensor System alarms and the formation of a Deployable Camera Unit

deferred.reason: Same-name different operating-agency/scope trap: LIRR security initiatives and NYCT security initiatives use a generic label but describe distinct agency-specific work.

conductor_apply_note: Do not apply any project aliases from this artifact. Re-run validation after other identity work; if these pairs remain, they are better candidates for do-not-merge review or identity-key cleanup than merge overrides.
